title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.479 - Duane S Michie Memorial Highway designated for a portion of State Highway D in Pemiscot County
text:
227.479.  Duane S Michie Memorial Highway designated for a portion of State Highway D in Pemiscot County. — The portion of State Highway D from the intersection with State Highway 84 continuing north to County Road 321 in Pemiscot County shall be designated the "Duane S Michie Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2021 S.B. 520)
